'''Crote''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who represented [[Frego]] until his arrest in [[40 BBY/Legends|40 BBY]], when he was found to be in league with the criminal [[Cobral family]] of his homeworld.

{{Char-stub}}
